title: Create events from a request span
scenario: A span carries context shared by multiple events. Request-scoped fields should not be rebuilt by every call site.
instructions: Extend LogFields with path. Define RequestSpan and an event method that builds a LogEvent with the span's request_id and path.

hints.body: Add path: String to LogFields so request path stays structured instead of being embedded in event_name.
RequestSpan::event should return a LogEvent with level LogLevel::Info, user_id None, attempt 1, and fields copied from the span.
One complete solution for Create events from a request span is shown below.

completionExplanation: RequestSpan now centralizes request_id and path so call sites can create structured LogEvent values without rebuilding shared context.
